---
output: pdf_document
---

```{r}

library(readr)
library(ggplot2)

```


```{r}

# read in data
re <- read_csv("./realEstate.csv")

# get rid of useless columns
re <- re[,c(-(1:3),-7,-12,-18,-27,-29,-(31:68))]

# remove observations with missing data
re <- na.omit(re)

```

# Subsets

```{r}

ca <- re[re$State == "CA",]
co <- re[re$State == "CO",]
den <- re[re$City == "Denver",]

```



# Code for Appendix (if needed)

```{r show-code, ref.label = all_labels(), echo = TRUE, eval = FALSE}

```
